safety.noAutomaticCrmRecords: No CRM records are created automatically
safety.noAutomaticGmailDraft: No Gmail draft is created automatically
safety.explicitDraftAction: Gmail draft creation requires explicit user action

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor what needs attention across CRM, AI, email, and calendar.

sections.actionRequiredDescription: The highest-signal items that need attention today.
sections.crmHealthDescription: Compact operating metrics for pipeline and task load.
sections.quickWorkspacesDescription: Jump into the right board or review surface.
sections.externalSyncSnapshotDescription: Gmail and Calendar metadata, kept compact so the dashboard stays focused.
sections.taskFocusDescription: A small sample of pending work.

aiWorkspace.title: Unified Review Hub
aiWorkspace.subtitle: A board-like workspace for AI review, safe sync controls, and synced input context. Cards navigate to detail pages; they do not apply CRM changes or send email.

sections.needsReviewDescription: Pending AI suggestions waiting for a human decision.
sections.readyForActionDescription: Accepted suggestions that have no completed action yet.
sections.completedDescription: Suggestions with applied CRM actions or Gmail draft creation.
sections.quickActionsDescription: Safe navigation and manual sync controls.
sections.recentInputsDescription: Latest email and calendar metadata available for AI review.

emptyStates.ready: No accepted suggestions waiting for action.

safety.emailMetadataOnly: AI uses synced email metadata/snippet only.
safety.calendarMetadataOnly: AI uses synced calendar metadata only.
safety.noGmailDraft: No Gmail draft is created automatically.
safety.noCrmRecords: No CRM records are created automatically.
safety.noTasksOrNotes: No tasks or notes are created automatically.
safety.generatedSuggestionsHumanReview: Generated suggestions must be reviewed by a human.
safety.crmActionsFromDetails: CRM actions happen only from reviewed suggestion details.

errors.existingEmailSuggestion: An AI suggestion already exists for this email. Open it from the existing suggestion link.
errors.existingCalendarSuggestion: An AI suggestion already exists for this calendar event. Open it from the existing suggestion link.
errors.googlePermissions: Reconnect Google to grant the required permissions.
errors.connectGoogleEmails: Connect or reconnect Google before syncing emails.
errors.connectGoogleCalendar: Connect or reconnect Google before syncing calendar events.
errors.emailActionFailed: Could not complete this AI action. Please try again.
errors.calendarActionFailed: Could not complete this AI action. Please try again.
errors.syncEmailsFailed: Could not sync Gmail messages. Please try again.
errors.syncCalendarFailed: Could not sync calendar events. Please try again.
errors.loadEmailBoardFailed: Could not load AI inbox board.
errors.loadCalendarBoardFailed: Could not load AI calendar board.
errors.loadCalendarFailed: Could not load synced calendar events.

syncedEmails.title: Synced Emails
syncedEmails.subtitle: View synced Gmail metadata and create AI suggestions for human review.
syncedEmails.boardSubtitle: Track synced Gmail metadata by AI processing state. Board cards can create AI suggestions for review, but they never send emails, create Gmail drafts, or create CRM records automatically.

columns.newDescription: No AI analysis or reply draft suggestion yet.
columns.needsReviewDescription: At least one AI suggestion is pending human review.
columns.readyDescription: Accepted suggestions with no completed action yet.
columns.completedDescription: CRM or Gmail draft action metadata exists.
columns.closedDescription: Related suggestions are rejected or expired.

emptyStates.boardDescription: Run a manual Gmail sync to review synced email metadata in the AI inbox board.
emptyStates.listDescription: Run a manual Gmail sync or adjust your search to review synced email metadata.

messages.readOnlyRole: Your role can view synced emails, but CRM write permissions are required to sync Gmail or create AI suggestions.

syncedCalendar.title: Synced Calendar Events
syncedCalendar.subtitle: View synced Google Calendar metadata and create AI calendar analysis suggestions for human review.
syncedCalendar.boardSubtitle: Track synced Google Calendar metadata by AI processing state. Board cards can create AI analysis suggestions for review, but they never create CRM records or send emails automatically.

columns.newDescription: No AI calendar analysis suggestion yet.
columns.needsReviewDescription: AI calendar analysis is pending human review.
columns.readyDescription: Accepted analysis with no completed CRM action yet.
columns.completedDescription: CRM task, note, or lead action metadata exists.
columns.noReady: No calendar events ready for action
columns.noClosed: No rejected or closed calendar events

list.searchPlaceholder: Search summary, location, organizer, or description

emptyStates.boardDescription: Run a manual Calendar sync to review synced event metadata in the AI calendar board.
emptyStates.listDescription: Run a manual Calendar sync or adjust your search to review synced calendar metadata.

messages.readOnlyRole: Your role can view synced calendar events, but CRM write permissions are required to sync Calendar or create AI suggestions.

aiSuggestions.title: AI Suggestions
aiSuggestions.subtitle: Review AI-generated recommendations before applying anything. Human approval is required, and this queue never sends email or changes CRM records automatically.
aiSuggestions.boardSubtitle: Review AI suggestions visually by status. Cards only open details; email sending, Gmail drafts, and CRM apply actions still require explicit human action on the detail page.

board.pendingDescription: Needs human review before anything can happen.
board.acceptedDescription: Approved suggestions that still have no completed action.
board.completedDescription: Accepted suggestions with applied CRM or Gmail draft actions.
board.expiredDescription: Suggestions that are no longer active.

list.searchPlaceholder: Search title, output, or source context

detail.pageSubtitle: Review the recommendation, source context, safety flags, and explicit human actions.
detail.calendarTaskCompletedSafety: Created by explicit human action. No email was sent automatically, and no lead, contact, company, or note was created automatically.
detail.calendarNoteCompletedSafety: Created by explicit human action. No email was sent automatically, and no lead, contact, company, or task was created automatically.
detail.calendarLeadCompletedSafety: Created by explicit human action. No email was sent automatically, and no company, contact, task, or note was created automatically.
detail.createCalendarTaskTitle: Create CRM task from reviewed calendar event
detail.createCalendarNoteTitle: Create CRM note from reviewed calendar event
detail.createCalendarLeadTitle: Create CRM lead from reviewed calendar event
detail.createCalendarTaskDescription: This creates one official CRM task from the accepted calendar review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email. No task is created automatically.
detail.createCalendarNoteDescription: This creates one official CRM note from the accepted calendar review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email. No note is created automatically.
detail.createCalendarLeadDescription: This creates one official CRM lead from the accepted calendar review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email. No lead is created automatically.
detail.calendarTaskPayloadDescription: The task will include safe synced calendar metadata, AI summary, reasoning, event identifiers, and a human approval notice. No company, contact, lead, note, or email will be created automatically.
detail.calendarNotePayloadDescription: The note will include safe synced calendar metadata, AI summary, reasoning, event identifiers, and a human approval notice. No company, contact, lead, task, or email will be created automatically.
detail.calendarLeadPayloadDescription: The lead will include safe synced calendar metadata, AI summary, reasoning, event identifiers, and a human approval notice. Existing company or contact links are reused only if already present on the suggestion. No company, contact, task, note, or email will be created automatically.
detail.createEmailTaskTitle: Create CRM task from reviewed email
detail.createEmailNoteTitle: Create CRM note from reviewed email
detail.createEmailLeadTitle: Create CRM lead from reviewed email
detail.createEmailTaskDescription: This creates one official CRM task from the accepted email review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email.
detail.createEmailNoteDescription: This creates one official CRM note from the accepted email review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email.
detail.createEmailLeadDescription: This creates one official CRM lead from the accepted email review. It requires this explicit human click and does not send an email.
detail.emailTaskPayloadDescription: The task will include safe synced email metadata, AI summary, reasoning, and a human approval notice. No contact, lead, or email will be created.
detail.emailNotePayloadDescription: The note will include safe synced email metadata and the AI suggested note. No contact, lead, task, or email will be created.
detail.emailLeadPayloadDescription: The lead will include safe synced email metadata, AI summary, reasoning, external identifiers, and a human approval notice. Existing company or contact links are reused only if already present on the suggestion.
detail.title: Title
detail.reviewDecisionDescription: Accepting or rejecting this suggestion only records a human review decision. It does not update CRM records, create tasks, create notes, create leads, or send emails.
detail.reviewNotePlaceholder: Add context about why you accept or reject this suggestion...
detail.emailTaskCreatedSuccess: CRM task created from external email review. Task ID:
detail.emailNoteCreatedSuccess: CRM note created from external email review. Note ID:
detail.emailLeadCreatedSuccess: CRM lead created from external email review. Lead ID:
detail.calendarTaskCreatedSuccess: CRM task created from external calendar review. Task ID:
detail.calendarNoteCreatedSuccess: CRM note created from external calendar review. Note ID:
detail.calendarLeadCreatedSuccess: CRM lead created from external calendar review. Lead ID:
detail.gmailDraftAlreadyCreated: A Gmail draft has already been created for this suggestion.
detail.gmailReconnectRequired: Reconnect Google with Gmail draft permissions before creating this draft.
